holdings.infoBox: FTAG is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Deere & Company stock at 9.78%, BASF SE at 9.53%, Corteva at 9.44%, Bayer Aktiengesellschaft at 7.72%, and Bunge Global at 4.74%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Global Agriculture ETF (FTAG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Global Agriculture index, a global, market-cap-weighted index of firms engaged in improving agricultural yields. FTAG was launched on Mar 12, 2010 and is issued by First Trust.
